name: Mexican Spaghetti (Tuesday)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the spaghetti in a large pot of boiling salted water for about 10 minutes, or until tender but not soft.
2. Meanwhile, heat olive oil in a skillet over medium heat. Add onion and cook for about 2 minutes, until softened. Add garlic and cook for an additional 30 seconds. Stir in reserved chipotle-tomatoes, canned tomatoes, salt, and pepper. Bring to a simmer and cook for 8-10 minutes.
3. Finely dice the avocado.
4. Drain spaghetti well in a colander or large strainer. In a large bowl, mix a bit of sauce with some pasta, then add remaining pasta and toss to coat. Add the rest of the sauce and toss again.
5. Scatter diced avocado over top. Serve with green salad and flour tortillas and butter.
